Upcoming Board Meetings.raw_headline: Infosys Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 23/04/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve 1. Approve and take on record the audited ....
Upcoming Board Meetings.headline: Infosys Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 23/04/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve 1. Approve and take on record the audited ....
Upcoming Board Meetings.pdf_text: TO ALL STOCK EXCHANGES BSE LIMITED NATIONAL STOCK EXCHANGE OF INDIA LIMITED NEW YORK STOCK EXCHANGE March 15, 2026 Dear Sir/ Madam, Sub: Board meeting This is to inform you that a meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company will be held on Wednesday and Thursday, April 22 and 23, 2026 inter alia to: 1. Approve and take on record the audited consolidated financial results of the Company and its subsidiaries as per Indian Accounting Standards (INDAS) for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026; 2. Approve and take on record the audited standalone financial results of the Company as per INDAS for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026; 3. Approve and take on record the audited financial statements of the Company and its subsidiaries as per INDAS and IFRS for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026; 4. Approve and take on record the audited financial statements of the Company and its subsidiaries as per INDAS for the financial year ending March 31, 2026; 5. Approve and take on record the audited financial statements of the Company as per INDAS for the financial year ending March 31, 2026; 6. Recommend a final dividend, if any for the financial year ending March 31, 2026. The financial results will be presented to the Board of Directors on April 23, 2026 for their approval. Trading window closure The Company will close the trading window for the earnings release of the quarter ending March 31, 2026 in compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, as amended. Accordingly, the trading window will be closed from March 16, 2026 and will re-open on April 27, 2026. Investors call The Company will hold investor/ analyst calls on April 23, 2026 to discuss the financial results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026 and business outlook. Details of the calls will be published on the Company’s website in due course. This is for your information and records. Yours Sincerely, For Infosys Limited A.G.S. M

Order Wins.pdf_text: Date: 15th March, 2026 To, The Corporate Relations Department, The Listing Department, BSE Limited, National Stock Exchange of India Limited, Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Exchange Plaza, C-1, Block G, Bandra-Kurla Complex, Dalal Street, Fort, Mumbai - 400 001 Bandra (East), Mumbai – 400 051 Scrip Code: 500825 Symbol: BRITANNIA Dear Sir/Madam, Sub : Appointment of Mr. Rakshit Hargave (DIN: 03406793) as the Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director of the Company Ref : Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (‘SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015’) Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Clause 7 of Para A of Part A of Schedule III of the SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015 and our letter dated 12th February, 2026, this is to inform you that the Members of the Company have approved, by way of Postal Ballot (conducted through remote E-voting process), the Ordinary Resolution as set out in the Notice of Postal Ballot dated 10th February, 2026, for appointment of Mr. Rakshit Hargave (DIN: 03406793) as the Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director of the Company, not liable to retire by rotation, for a term of 5 (five) years with effect from 15th December, 2025 to 14th December, 2030 (both days inclusive). The results of the Postal Ballot were declared today i.e., Sunday, 15th March, 2026 at 11:23 P.M. (IST). The details as required under Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015 read with the SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026 are enclosed as ‘Annexure I’. Request you to please take the above information on record. Thanking you, Yours faithfully, For Britannia Industries Limited Sona Rajora Company Secretary & Compliance Officer ICSI Membership No.: A35468 Encl.: As aboveAnnexure I SI. Order Wins.raw_headline: Demise of Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar, Chairman and Independent Director of the Company on March 14, 2026
Order Wins.headline: Demise of Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar, Chairman and Independent Director of the Company on March 14, 2026
Order Wins.pdf_text: Date: March 15, 2026 To, BSE Limited National Stock Exchange of India Limited Listing Department Listing Department 25th Floor, P J Towers, Exchange Plaza, Bandra Kurla Complex, Dalal Street, Bandra (East) Mumbai – 400 001 Mumbai – 400 051 Scrip Code: 540901 Symbol: PRAXIS Sub: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015- Demise of Vijai Singh Dugar Dear Sir/Madam, We are deeply saddened to announce the sudden demise of Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar, Chairman and Independent Director of the Company, on March 14, 2026. Mr. Vijai had been associated with the Company August 12, 2024, which was his first term on the Board. Mr. Vijai’s experience & expertise in Financial Accounting, Internal Audit & Strategic business planning had been invaluable to the Company. Mr. Vijai will always be remembered with great respect and admiration. The Board of Directors of the Company and senior management convey their deepest sympathy and heartfelt condolences to his bereaved family. The requisite details regarding the cessation of the Independent Directorship of Late Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar under Regulation 30 read with Para A (7) of Part A of Schedule III of the Listing Regulations and SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFDPOD2/I/3762/2026 dated 30th January, 2026 are provided in Annexure to this letter. The above information is also being made available on the website of the Company www.praxisretail.in Kindly take the same on your record. Thanking you, For Praxis Home Retail Limited Charu Srivastava Head Legal & Company Secretary Encl: As above PRAXIS HOME RETAIL LIMITED CIN: L52100MH2011PLC212866 Registered Off.: 2nd Floor, Knowledge House, Shyam Nagar, Off Jogeshwari-Vikhroli Link Road, Jogeshwari (East), Mumbai-400060 Tel.: +91 22 4959 2500; website: www.praxisretail.in; e-mail: investorrelations@praxisretail.inAnnexure-I Sr. Particulars Details No. Owing to the unfortunate de

Order Wins.pdf_text: SEC/SE/122/2025-26 Chennai, March 15, 2026 To To National Stock Exchange of India Limited BSE Limited Exchange Plaza, Bandra Kurla Complex, 25th Floor, P.J. Towers, Bandra(E), Dalal Street, Mumbai – 400051 Mumbai – 400 001 NSE Symbol - DATAPATTNS Company Code: 543428 Sub: Corrigendum – Revision of Order Value and Quantity Ref: Bagging/ Receiving Orders/Contracts – Data Patterns (India) Limited secures Rs.288 Cr. New Order. Dear Sir/ Madam, This has referent to our earlier communicated bearing Letter no.SEC/SE/121/2025-26 dated March 15, 2026 on the intimation of receipt of a Contract for a value of Rs.279 Crores for supply of 34 units of Doppler Weather Radars. We wish to clarify that the Order Value and Quantity were incorrectly mentioned in the said communication due to inadvertent error. The correct details of the Order are Rs.288 Crores for supply of 32 units of Doppler Weather Radars. Pursuant to Regulations 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 read with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024, the details of the said order is given below: S.No. Particulars Details 1. Order Wins.raw_headline: We are pleased to inform you that the Company has received a contract for Rs.279 Crore for supply of 34 units of Doppler Weather Radars to Indian Metrological Department.
Order Wins.headline: We are pleased to inform you that the Company has received a contract for Rs.279 Crore for supply of 34 units of Doppler Weather Radars to Indian Metrological Department.
Order Wins.subcategory: Award of Order / Receipt of Order
Order Wins.pdf_text: SEC/SE/121/2025-26 Chennai, March 15, 2026 To To National Stock Exchange of India Limited BSE Limited Exchange Plaza, Bandra Kurla Complex, 25th Floor, P.J. Towers, Bandra(E), Dalal Street, Mumbai – 400051 Mumbai – 400 001 NSE Symbol - DATAPATTNS Company Code: 543428 Sub: Bagging/ Receiving Orders/Contracts – Data Patterns (India) Limited secures Rs.279 Cr. New Order. Dear Sir/ Madam, Pursuant to Regulations 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 read with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024, we are pleased to inform you that the Company has received a Contract for Rs.279 Crore for supply of 34 units of Doppler Weather Radars to Indian Metrological Department (IMD). This Contract was negotiated with IMD earlier and the Contract was received now. This is part of negotiated contract announced after Q3 FY 2025-26. The details of the same is given below: S.No. Particulars Details 1. Name of the entity awarding the Indian Metrological Department order(s)/contract(s) 2. Significant terms and conditions of Supply of 34 units of Doppler Weather Radars order(s)/contract(s) awarded in brief 3. Whether order(s) / contract(s) have been Domestic Entity awarded by domestic/ international entity 4. Nature of order(s) / contract(s); Supply of 34 units of Doppler Weather Radars 5. Whether domestic or international; Domestic 6. Time period by which the order(s)/contract(s) As per Contract is to be executed 7. Broad consideration or size of the Rs. 279 Crore order(s)/contract(s) 8. Whether the promoter/ promoter group / No group companies have any interest in the entity that awarded the order(s)/contract(s)? If yes, nature of interest and details thereof 9. Whether the order(s)/contract(s) would fall No within related party transactions? If yes, whether the same is done at “arm’s length”.We request you to take the above record and oblige. Thanking You. For Data Patterns (India) Limited Prakash R Company Secretar
Order Wins.clean_headline: Data Patterns (India) Limited secured a Rs. 279 crore contract for supply of 34 Doppler Weather Radars to the Indian Meteorological Department.

Order Wins.raw_headline: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
Order Wins.headline: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
Order Wins.pdf_text: Gillette India Limited CIN: L28931MH1984PLC267130 Regd. Office P&G Plaza, Cardinal Gracias Road, Chakala, Andheri (E), Mumbai - 400099 Tel : 91-22-6958 6000 Fax : 91-22-6958 7337 Website: in.pg.com March 15, 2026 To, National Stock Exchange of India Limited BSE Limited Exchange Plaza, 5th Floor, Plot No. C/1, First Floor, New Trading Wing, Rotunda G Block, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (East), Building, P J Towers, Dalal Street, Fort Mumbai 400 051 Dalal Street, Fort, Mumbai -400001 NSE Symbol: GILLETTE BSE Scrip Code: 507815 Dear Sir/Ma’am, Sub: Intimation under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (“SEBI Listing Regulations”) This is to inform that the Company has become aware of a communication dated 18th February 2026 from the Rajasthan State Pollution Control Board (RSPCB) intimating refusal of Consent to Operate (CTO) for its Bhiwadi manufacturing facility and refusal to renew authorisation under Hazardous Waste (Management & Transboundary movement) Rules (HWM Rules). This communication was in response to Company’s application for renewal of CTO and the authorisation under HWM Rules. The Company is evaluating appropriate legal remedies and engaging with the RSPCB. The Company will update the exchanges on material developments, if any. Kindly take the above on record and oblige. For Gillette India Limited Flavia Machado Company Secretary Membership Number: ACS 38986

Order Wins.headline: The Company has opened its exclusive brand store at Punyai Business Square, Paud Road, Pune -411038, today i.e. on March 15, 2026.
Order Wins.pdf_text: Date: March 15, 2026 To, To, BSE Limited National Stock Exchange of India Limited Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Exchange Plaza, C-1, Block-G, BKC, Dalal Street, Mumbai- 400001 Bandra (East), Mumbai- 400051 Scrip Code: 544718 Symbol: PNGSREVA Subject: Intimation under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. Dear Sir/ Madam, Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform you that, the Company has opened its exclusive brand store at Punyai Business Square, Paud Road, Kothrud, Pune -411038, today i.e. March 15, 2026. With this addition, as on date, the Company has total 34 SIS stores with P. N. Gadgil & Sons Limited and 2 Exclusive Brand Stores (EBO). Kindly take this on your record please. Thanking you, For PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Limited Kirti Vaidya Company Secretary & Compliance Officer Membership No.: A31430

Management Changes.headline: Interim appointment of Mr. Aman Sisodia, Company Secretary & Compliance Officer of the Company to additionally  hold the position of Chief Financial Officer of the Company with effect from ....
Management Changes.pdf_text: Date: 15th March, 2026 To, To, Department of Corporate Services The Secretary, BSE Limited The Calcutta Stock Exchange Limited P.J. Towers, Dalal Street 7, Lyons Range Mumbai- 400 001 Kolkata- 700 001 Scrip Code: 533285 Scrip Code: 28393 Subject: Intimation for appointment of Chief Financial Officer and Key Managerial Personnel- Disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 Dear Sir / Madam, Pursuant to Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (“SEBI Listing Regulations”), we wish to inform you that the Board of Directors at it meeting held on 14th March, 2026 and based on the recommendation of Nomination and Remuneration Committee has approved the interim appointment of Mr. Aman Sisodia (PAN: BGJPA4261R), Company Secretary & Compliance Officer to additionally hold the position of Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) of the Company w.e.f. 14th March, 2026 under Section 203 of Companies Act, 2013 read with its applicable Rules and Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The disclosure as required under Schedule III of the SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015, read with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated 11th November, 2024 is attached herewith and marked as Annexure A. This is for your information and records. Thanking you, For RDB Infrastructure and Power Limited (Formerly known as RDB Realty & Infrastructure Limited) Aman Sisodia Company Secretary & Compliance OfficerANNEXURE - A Disclosure in terms of Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations read with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated 11th November, 2024 Appointment of Mr. Aman Sisodia as Chief Financial Officer and Key Managerial Personnel of the Company S. No. Particular Remarks 1 Name of Chief Financial Officer Mr. Aman Sisodia 2

Management Changes.pdf_text: AIRFLOA RAILTECHNOLOGYLIMITED (Formerly known as Airflow Equipments India Pvt Ltd) Date: 15/03/2026 To, BSE Limited Department of Corporate Services, Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Dalal Street, Fort, Mumbai - 400 001 Script Symbol: AIRFLOA Scrip Code: 544516 Subject: REVISED Intimation under Regulation 30, SEBI (Listing obligation and Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015– Airfloa Rail Technology Limited Secures ₹ 62.36 Crores New Order Dear Sir / Madam, With reference to our earlier Intimation dated March 15, 2026 regarding the receipt of Purchase order of Rs.62.36 Crores, Pursuant to the Regulation 30 read with Schedule III Part A of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations, 2015 (SEBI LODR Regulations), we wish to inform you that there was a Typographical Error with regard to the date of completion of supplies in the Purchase order received by us which has been confirmed by the Purchaser vide their E-mail dated 15th March 2026. The rectified date of the Completion of the supply is March 25, 2027 instead of March 25, 2026 remaining other things unchanged. The REVISED disclosure as required under Schedule III of the SEBI LODR Regulations read with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024 as amended read with Regulation 30 of the (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 is attached herewith and marked as Annexure A to this letter. Kindly acknowledge and take the same on records. Thanking you, Yours faithfully, For Airfloa Rail Technology Limited Haraprasad Rout Company Secretary and Compliance Officer Membership No.: A18749 No.9, Chelliamman Koll Street, Keelkatalai, Chennai - 600117 CIN No: • U30204TN1998PLC041571, GST No: 33AACCA9641E1ZY Mobile:-9384870774, Website:-www.airfloa.com, E-mail: airflow1998@hotmail.comAnnexure A Revised Disclosure in terms of Regulations 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations read with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/C

Management Changes.raw_headline: Demise of Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar, Independent Director of the Company
Management Changes.headline: Demise of Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar, Independent Director of the Company
Management Changes.pdf_text: March 15, 2026 To, BSE Limited Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Dalal Street, Mumbai - 400 001 Scrip Code: 506186 Dear Sir/Madam Sub: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (‘Listing Regulations’) – Demise of Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar, Independent Director We are deeply saddened to announce the sudden demise of Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar, Independent Director of the Company, on 14th March, 2026. Mr. Vijai had been associated with the Company as a Non-Executive, Independent Director since 14th November, 2023 which was his first term on the Board. Mr. Vijai’s experience & expertise in Financial Accounting, Internal Audit & Strategic business planning had been invaluable to the Company. Mr. Vijai will always be remembered with great respect and admiration. The Board of Directors of the Company and senior management convey their deepest sympathy and heartfelt condolences to his bereaved family. The requisite details regarding the cessation of the Independent Directorship of Late Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar under Regulation 30 read with Para A (7) of Part A of Schedule III of the Listing Regulations and SEBI Master Circular No. SEBI/HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD- POD2/I/3762/2026 dated 30th January, 2026 are provided in Annexure to this letter. Management Changes.raw_headline: Carraro India Limited has informed the Exchange about receipt of favorable order from the Commissioner of Customs, Pune.
Management Changes.headline: Carraro India Limited has informed the Exchange about receipt of favorable order from the Commissioner of Customs, Pune.
Management Changes.pdf_text: 15th March, 2026 The Manager, The Manager, BSE Limited, National Stock Exchange of India Limited, Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Exchange Plaza, Bandra-Kurla Complex, Dalal Street, Mumbai - 400 001 Bandra (E), Mumbai - 400 051 BSE Scrip Code: 544320 NSE Symbol: CARRARO Sub.: Intimation of favourable order dated 13th March, 2026 from Office of the Commissioner of Customs, Pune, 41-A, ICE House, opp. Wadia college, Sassoon road, Pune 01 (Customs Order). Ref.: i. Intimation of Show Cause Notice dated 02nd September, 2025 from Office of the Commissioner of Customs, Pune, 41-A, ICE House, opp. Wadia college, Sassoon road, Pune 01 filed with exchanges on 03rd September, 2025 (SCN); ii. Regulation 30 read with Clause 8 of Para B of Part A of Schedule III of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 (“Listing Regulations”). Dear Sir/Madam, With reference to the above-mentioned SCN and Listing regulations, we would like to inform that the Company has received a favorable order from Office of the Commissioner of Customs, Pune, 41-A, ICE House, opp. Wadia college, Sassoon road, Pune 01 bearing order no PUNE-CUSTOMS-000 - COMMR-02/2025-26 dated 13th March, 2026 (hereinafter referred to as the “Customs Order”). The Customs order has been received by the Company on 14th March, 2026 vide email at 16:43 p.m. Pursuant to the submissions filed by the Company and representations made before the tax authorities, a tax demand on account of short levy of IGST @ 10% has been dropped. As a consequence, the Company has obtained complete relief from the tax demand of Rs. 7,92,36,269/-. The details required under Schedule III of the Listing Regulations read with SEBI Master Circular no. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated 11th November, 2024 are enclosed as Annexure A. Management Changes.raw_headline: To inform for Demise of Shri L.K. Jhunjhunwala
Management Changes.headline: To inform for Demise of Shri L.K. Jhunjhunwala
Management Changes.pdf_text: gy K.M. Sugar Mills Ltd. Factory & Works: PO Motinagar-224201, Dist. Ayodhya(U.P) Phone :7571000692,Email - director@kmsugarcom CIN No.L15421UP1971PLC003492 GSTIN No.09AAACKS545P12Z R rr e Date: March 15, 2026 BSE Limited, National Stock Exchange of India Limited, 25t Floor, Phiroz Jejeebhoy Towers, Exchange Plaza, C-1, Block-G, Dalal Street, Fort, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E), Mumbai-400001 Mumbai-400051 Phone no. 022-22728527 Phone no. 022-26598100 Scrip Code:532673 Symbol: KMSUGAR Dear Sir/Madam, Subject: Intimation of Death of Shri. Laxmikant Dwarkadas Jhunjhunwala (DIN-01854647), Promoter / Whole Time Director under Regulation 30 and 31 A of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Pursuant to Regulation 30 and Regulation 31A of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, this is to inform you with immense grief about the sad demise of Shri Laxmikant Dwarkadas Jhunjhunwala_(DIN: 01854647), Chairman, Promoter and Director on 14t March, 2026. Shri LK. Jhunjhunwala was a great leader and a visionary, whose guidance and foresight immensely benefitted the Company. His sudden and unexpected passing away is an irreparable loss to the Company. The Company and all its employees convey their deepest sympathy, sorrow, and heartfelt condolences to his family. Further, it is hereby informed that he shall cease to be part of the Promoter / Promoter Group of the Company in accordance with Regulation 31A(6)(c) of the SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015. The details as required under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 read with Master Circular issued vide circular no. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024, are enclosed herewith as Annexure-A You are requested to kindly take the above information on your records. Operational Alerts.pdf_text: L-1/0019/JG/PD March 14, 2026 To, BSE Limited : Code No. 500031 Department of Corporate Services Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, Dalal Street, Mumbai 400 001. National Stock Exchange of India Limited : BAJAJELEC - Series: EQ Listing Department Exchange Plaza, Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (East), Mumbai 400 051. Sub.: Disclosure under Regulation 30 of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, as amended (“SEBI Listing Regulations”), by Bajaj Electricals Limited (“Company”) Dear Sir/Madam, Pursuant to the provisions of Regulation 30 (read with sub-para 8 of Para B and/or sub-para 20 of Para A of Part A of Schedule III) of the SEBI Listing Regulations, and in accordance with the Company’s Policy on the Determination of Materiality for Disclosure of Events or Information, we hereby inform you that the Company has received two assessment orders, passed under Section 74 and Section 73 of the Tamil Nadu GST Act, 2017, for FYs 2019-20 and 2022-23, respectively, in the state of Tamil Nadu (“Orders”) (received by the Company on March 13, 2026, at 16:11 hours). The details as required under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations read with SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 (last updated on January 30, 2026), are enclosed as ‘Annexure A’. The management is currently evaluating appropriate legal options, which, inter alia, include filing an appeal before the appropriate appellate authority or a writ petition before the Hon’ble High Court against the said orders. We request you to kindly take the above on record and treat the same as compliance with the applicable provisions of the SEBI Listing Regulations. Thanking you, Yours faithfully, For Bajaj Electricals Limited Prashant Dalvi Chief Compliance Officer & Company Secretary (ICSI Membership No.: A51129) Encl.: as above. Bajaj Electricals Limited | CIN: L31500MH1938PLC009887 Registered Office: Mulla House, 2nd Floor, 51 Mahatma Gandhi

summaries.Mergers & Schemes:
> ⚠️ **Note:** The announcements provided contain only headlines and company metadata — no document body, financial figures, ₹ values, percentages, or deal specifics were shared. The bullets below reflect only what can be factually stated from the headlines, with transparent caveats where numbers are absent.

---

- **Indo National Limited (NIPPOBATRY)**
NCLT Chennai has issued its **final order** approving the Scheme of Amalgamation involving Indo National Limited; specific swap ratios, timelines, or merged entity details were not included in the provided announcement.
📊 **Impact: Neutral-to-Positive** — A court has officially given the green light for this company merger, meaning the paperwork hurdle is cleared; think of it like a wedding getting official government approval — the couple can now actually start their life together.
👀 **Watch:** Whether the company publishes the actual share swap ratio (how many shares existing NIPPOBATRY holders will receive in the new merged entity) — that number will directly decide if shareholders win or lose.

---

- **JK Paper Ltd. (JKPAPER)**
JK Paper's Scheme of Arrangement has become **effective**, meaning all regulatory and legal conditions have been formally satisfied; no specific financial terms, demerger ratios, or asset values were included in the provided announcement.
📊 **Impact: Neutral-to-Positive** — The restructuring plan JK Paper announced earlier has now officially kicked in — like a renovation project finally getting its final building permit, the actual work (or benefit to shareholders) can now begin.
👀 **Watch:** The **record date** JK Paper sets for determining which shareholders are eligible to receive any new shares or entitlements under this arrangement — missing that date means missing the benefit entirely.

---

*Sector Theme: Two separate companies completing merger/restructuring formalities in the same session suggests courts and regulators are clearing a backlog of pending corporate restructuring cases — not a market-moving theme, but worth noting for other companies with pending NCLT approvals.*
summaries.Upcoming Board Meetings:
• **Infosys Ltd (INFY)**  — The board has scheduled meetings on April 22 and 23, 2026 to approve audited financial results for Q4 and the full financial year ending March 31, 2026, along with standalone results.
📊 **Impact:** Neutral — This is a routine, mandatory meeting that every listed company holds to officially sign off on its yearly report card; no new business news here.
👀 **Watch:** The actual revenue and profit numbers when results are declared on April 22–23 — specifically whether full-year earnings meet or beat analyst estimates.

---
⚠️ **Data Quality Note:** The headline attributes this announcement to *Dishman Carbogen Amcis*, but the document text is clearly from **Infosys Ltd** (filed across BSE, NSE, and NYSE). The symbol provided is INFY. The bullet above has been written using the actual document content for Infosys. If Dishman Carbogen Amcis (DCAL) has a separate board meeting on March 18, 2026 for a fund-raise, that document was not included — please verify the source data before publishing.
summaries.Order Wins:
Here are the pre-market bullets for today's Order Wins announcements:

---

- **Data Patterns India (DATAPATTNS)** — The company won a ₹279 crore contract to supply 34 Doppler Weather Radars to the Indian Meteorological Department, later revised upward to ₹288 crore via a corrigendum filed the same day.
📊 **Impact:** Positive — Data Patterns has just bagged a meaningful government defence/weather contract worth nearly ₹288 crore, which is fresh business that will add to its revenues over the coming quarters; winning orders from a government body like IMD also signals credibility.
👀 **Watch:** Whether the revised order value of ₹288 crore is the final figure, or if any further quantity/price adjustments are filed in the days ahead.

---

- **Britannia Industries (BRITANNIA)** — The filing announces the appointment of Mr. Rakshit Hargave (DIN: 03406793) as Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director of the company.
📊 **Impact:** Neutral — This is a leadership change disclosure, not an order win; a new MD/CEO can matter over the long term, but there is no revenue or profit impact announced today.
👀 **Watch:** Whether the company releases any statement on the new MD's strategic priorities — especially around pricing, new product launches, or cost management — in the weeks following his appointment.

---

- **Praxis Home Retail (PRAXIS)** — The company announced the sudden demise of Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar, its Chairman and Independent Director.
📊 **Impact:** Negative — Losing a Chairman suddenly is never good news for a company; it creates a leadership gap on the board and can unsettle investor confidence in the short term, even if operations are unaffected.
👀 **Watch:** How quickly the company names a replacement Chairman or Independent Director, as an empty board seat at the top signals governance uncertainty to investors.

---

- **Gillette India (GILLETTE)** — The filing is a Regulation 30 compliance submission; the actual content relates to an Adani Power Letter of Award from Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company for 1,600 MW thermal power supply on a long-term basis — this has **no connection** to Gillette India.
📊 **Impact:** Neutral — This appears to be a data mismatch in the exchange feed; the document content belongs to a different company entirely, meaning there is no actual news for Gillette India here.
👀 **Watch:** Whether Gillette India files a corrected or separate disclosure clarifying what the original Regulation 30 intimation was actually meant to communicate.

---

- **PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery (PNGSREVA)** — The company opened a new exclusive brand store at Punyai Business Square, Paud Road, Kothrud, Pune on March 15, 2026; the filing headline references an Airfloa Rail order of ₹62.36 crore which belongs to a different company.
📊 **Impact:** Neutral — Opening one new jewellery store in Pune is a small, routine business expansion step; it may add a little revenue over time but is unlikely to move the stock on its own.
👀 **Watch:** How many more stores the company opens over the next two quarters, since for a retail jewellery brand, store count growth is the clearest signal of whether expansion is picking up pace
summaries.Management Changes:
• **Newgen Software Technologies (NEWGEN)** — The filing header references Newgen Software, but the actual announcement buried inside appears to relate to a Britannia Industries CEO appointment (Mr. Rakshit Hargave as CEO & MD); the document extract is mismatched and contains no Newgen-specific news.
📊 **Impact:** Neutral — this appears to be a data/filing mismatch; there is no meaningful news about Newgen itself in this document.
👀 **Watch:** Whether Newgen files a corrected or separate disclosure clarifying what material event they actually intended to announce.

---

• **RDB Infrastructure And Power Ltd (533285)** — The company appointed Mr. Aman Sisodia as Chief Financial Officer, in addition to his existing role as Company Secretary, as disclosed under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations on March 15, 2026.
📊 **Impact:** Neutral — giving one person two jobs at once is a cost-saving move, but it also means a smaller company is running lean on senior leadership, which is neither exciting nor alarming.
👀 **Watch:** Whether RDB separately hires a dedicated CFO in the coming quarters, as wearing both hats can stretch a person thin in a growing infrastructure company.

---

• **Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd (AIRFLOA / 544516)** — The company secured a new purchase order worth ₹62.36 crore, and this filing is a *revised* intimation correcting an earlier announcement dated March 15, 2026.
📊 **Impact:** Positive — winning a ₹62 crore order is like getting a big new contract; it means real work and real revenue coming in for this relatively small rail technology company.
👀 **Watch:** What the exact timeline for execution of this ₹62.36 crore order is, and whether the company can deliver on schedule without delays that could hurt margins.

---

• **Galaxy Supermarket Ltd (506186)** — Mr. Vijai Singh Dugar, Independent Director of the company since November 14, 2023, passed away suddenly on March 14, 2026.
📊 **Impact:** Negative — losing a board member unexpectedly is sad news; it also means the company must now quickly find a replacement to stay compliant with rules about having enough independent directors on the board.
👀 **Watch:** How fast the company appoints a new Independent Director, since SEBI rules require a minimum number and a long gap could attract regulatory scrutiny.

---

• **Carraro India Limited (CARRARO)** — The filing actually discloses a *favourable customs order* dated March 13, 2026 from the Office of the Commissioner of Customs, Pune, relating to a Show Cause Notice originally issued on September 2, 2025; the headline about an Independent Director's tenure completion does not match the document content.
📊 **Impact:** Positive — winning a customs dispute means the company likely does not have to pay a penalty or extra duty that was being demanded, which protects its cash and profits.
👀 **Watch:** The exact amount of duty/penalty that was at stake in this customs case, which Carraro has not disclosed in the extract — that number will tell you how meaningful this win actually is.

---

• **K.M. Sugar Mills Ltd (KMSUGAR)** — Shri Laxmikant Dwarkadas Jhunjhunwala (DIN: 01854
summaries.Operational Alerts:
• **Bajaj Electricals Ltd. (BAJAJELEC)** — This disclosure appears to reference a drug license suspension order involving Optival Health Solutions, a subsidiary of Medplus Health Services — an entirely unrelated company — with no actual Bajaj Electricals business news contained in the document extract provided.
📊 **Impact:** Neutral — This looks like a filing mix-up or data error; the announcement text has nothing to do with Bajaj Electricals, which makes fans, lighting, and appliances, not medicines or pharmacies.
👀 **Watch:** Whether Bajaj Electricals files a corrected or complete disclosure clarifying what this Regulation 30 filing was actually meant to announce.
summaries.Operations & Capacity:
• **Adani Power Limited (ADANIPOWER)** — The company received a Letter of Award for long-term supply of 1,600 MW of thermal power.
📊 **Impact:** Positive — This is like Adani Power getting a big, confirmed electricity supply contract, meaning they have guaranteed business lined up for years ahead, which is good for their revenues.
👀 **Watch:** Whether Adani Power announces the name of the buying entity and the tariff rate locked in under this Letter of Award, as that will determine how profitable this contract actually is.

---
⚠️ *Note to reader: The headline in this section mistakenly references PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery — that appears to be a data mismatch. The actual document clearly belongs to Adani Power and covers the 1,600 MW thermal power Letter of Award. The jewellery store news has no connection to this filing and has been disregarded.*
summaries.Regulatory & BSE Queries:
* **Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd (AIRFLOA)** — The company has won a new order worth ₹62.36 crore, as announced on March 15, 2026.
📊 **Impact:** Positive — The company just got a big new contract worth over ₹62 crore, which means more work, more revenue, and more money coming in over the next few months.
👀 **Watch:** Whether the company shares a timeline for executing this ₹62.36 crore order, as delays in delivery would eat into the expected revenue boost.

---

* **Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd (HINDPETRO)** — The company announced the retirement of Director Shri K S Narendiran (DIN: 10070865) on completion of his tenure on March 14, 2026.
📊 **Impact:** Neutral — A senior person at the company has simply retired after finishing their fixed term; this is a routine change and does not affect HPCL's business or profits in any way.
👀 **Watch:** Whether HPCL names a replacement director and how quickly the board vacancy is filled, since a prolonged gap in leadership could slow down internal decisions.

---

> ⚠️ **Data Mismatch Note:** The headlines provided do not match the actual document content for either company. For AIRFLOA, the headline references a "Carraro India" customs order, but the document is about an AIRFLOA new order win. For HINDPETRO, the headline mentions an income tax demand of ₹28.37 crore, but the document is actually about a director retirement. The bullets above are based on the **actual document content**, not the mismatched headlines.
